name: Hasnain Shinwari
title: Cybersecurity Analyst | Linux Administrator | Penetration Tester
intro: Computer Science graduate with 3 years of hands-on experience in Linux systems, networking, virtualization, and cybersecurity. Experienced in Linux administration, penetration testing, enterprise networking, and Capture The Flag (CTF) challenges.
bio: I am deeply passionate about securing enterprise infrastructures, hardening Linux systems, and uncovering critical security vulnerabilities. With a solid foundation in computer science and extensive time spent building virtual network labs, I simulate advanced threat environments to analyze attack vectors from both offensive and defensive perspectives. I design secure networks, write custom automated scripts in Bash and Python, and support operating systems education through labs and troubleshooting.
